subject: Re: interesting
body:
# 1   - we are having trouble getting  a ride from  the airport yet hesitate  
now , tho you have always been kind for  sure  - 
To get Jo-Jo  at this  late hour   is  ridiculous i know and , dont expect 
that  now , though truthfully, I  am trying so hard to be the dutiful "wife "   
that I am painfully , no  kidding, going to go bcs. cannot deal with Bruce's 
flack bcs. changing flight at  this late date and hour  is more expensive and 
he isn't in to it.  I'll go, but wondered  if I should bite the bullet.  What 
do you  think ?  (guess i have , not to happily because of how i feel .  He 
called service "DIAL"   - but my snob has  emerged as those services like 777 or 
888 are generally smelly "towel heads "  (sorry - i  hurt and i'm cranky ) -  
you already know I  am  usually   happier  so my excuses are nil;.  
i SOUnd bithcy and sure Bruce would   say  so.
Is this service OK  ?  
  - - at least to get where we are going , wherever that is  bcs, that is 
where the teachers for this program are put up .  (CARDOZA lAW  SCHOOL)   OR -   
Maybe just to get around a bit  even in the City  because I just can't  
physically  walk umpteenth  blocks , (which  I HATE , because it makes me feel 
defeated or invalidy  ,   especiallly with stuff, - - -  should I be so lucky ,  
and  seems cabs might be difficult ---------- busy , cold , depends on the hour  
 ,   Man, I feel like caving -unlike me.  REALLY  SORRY.
 
# 2    ***   I need to speak to you and I  will need some addtitional info 
from you but will tell you in person or by  private phone bcs, I don't trust 
anybody , let alone cops or FBI or    ....
There are things in your chart distinctive and you should know them  all . I 
also need some data you will know and I do not or privy to.    OK ?
 
I know you are  short and sweet  and cut to the bottom  line ;    I'm  not as 
good at it  but I hear you decifer what you need to know so I know you '  ll
 
 
 cut to the chase !  Easy for you.  OK  ?
I trust you will.
thanks ,  me                              ( ARE THOSE two BASIC ITEMs  OR AM 
i LOSING IT  ? ) don't answer that  .
p.s.  didn't re-read and i might soul like a real idiot  -  sorry again.
 
954-296-0002
 
 
 
 
 CHEERS,                                                    
Marcia M.

body_html:
# 1   - we are having trouble getting  a ride from the airport yet hesitate  now , tho you have always been kind for sure  -
To get Jo-Jo  at this  late hour   is ridiculous i know and , dont expect that  now , though truthfully, I am trying so hard to be the dutiful "wife "   that I am painfully , no kidding, going to go bcs. cannot deal with Bruce's flack bcs. changing flight at this late date and hour  is more expensive and he isn't in to it.  I'll go, but wondered  if I should bite the bullet.  What do you think ?  (guess i have , not to happily because of how i feel .  He called service "DIAL"   - but my snob has emerged as those services like 777 or 888 are generally smelly "towel heads "  (sorry - i  hurt and i'm cranky ) -  you already know I  am usually   happier  so my excuses are nil;. 
i SOUnd bithcy and sure Bruce would   say so.
Is this service OK  ?  
  - - at least to get where we are going , wherever that is bcs, that is where the teachers for this program are put up .  (CARDOZA lAW SCHOOL)   OR -   Maybe just to get around a bit  even in the City because I just can't  physically  walk umpteenth  blocks , (which I HATE , because it makes me feel defeated or invalidy  ,   especiallly with stuff, - - -  should I be so lucky ,  and seems cabs might be difficult ---------- busy , cold , depends on the hour  ,   Man, I feel like caving -unlike me.  REALLY SORRY.
 
# 2    ***   I need to speak to you and I will need some addtitional info from you but will tell you in person or by private phone bcs, I don't trust anybody , let alone cops or FBI or   ...
There are things in your chart distinctive and you should know them all . I also need some data you will know and I do not or privy to.     OK ?
 
I know you are  short and sweet  and cut to the bottom line ;    I'm  not as good at it     but I hear you decifer what you need to know so I know you ' ll
 
 
 cut to the chase !  Easy for you.  OK ?
I trust you will.
thanks , me                             ( ARE THOSE two BASIC ITEMs  OR AM i LOSING IT  ? ) don't answer that .
p.s.  didn't re-read and i might soul like a real idiot -  sorry again.
 
954-296-0002
 
 
 
 
 CHEERS,                                                   
Marcia M.

subject: Re: interesting
body:
what can I do?


----- Original Message ----
From: "Maemarcia@aol.com" <Maemarcia@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, January 5, 2008 4:28:20 PM
Subject: interesting


Jeffrey   I have some newer light on  your issue ,   and thought you just might have some interest --
Not sure of your whereabouts and thought maybe we could communicate but may by e-mail  not so as cool ?    You know the plan is for US to go the NY  tomorrow   but i'm not sure if I want to leave as early bs,  had that epi. yesterday and don't want to screw or my potential progress it up , but the funner girl in me wants to go if I can change    my flight .  Bruce not so positive so I'm toying with crapping out. Don't want to but would like to convey things to you for a start.      Guide me.  please.
 
 
 
Marcia M
